ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotel_lists" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel or resort list */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the hotel or resort list */,
  "record_count" TEXT /* Approximate number of records in the list */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the list */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the list was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the hotel or resort list */,
  "hotel_chain" TEXT /* Hotel chain (e.g., Marriott, Hilton) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the hotel or resort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the continent (e.g., North America, South America) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_list_countries" (
  "list_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each list-country relationship */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel or resort list */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_list_countries_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES hotel_lists ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_list_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shopping cart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the cart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the cart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the cart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shopping cart the item belongs to */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel or resort list */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES hotel_lists ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the purchase */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel or resort list purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES hotel_lists ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel or resort list reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the list */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES hotel_lists ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_amenities" (
  "hotel_amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel-amenity relationship */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel or resort list */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_amenities_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES hotel_lists ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_amenities_amenity_id FOREIGN KEY ("amenity_id") REFERENCES amenities ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the loyalty program */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points accumulated */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level in the loyalty program */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the loyalty points expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personalized_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personalized offer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is eligible for the offer */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel or resort list */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered */,
  "offer_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offer */,
  "offer_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the offer */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer (e.g., discount, free night) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personalized_offers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personalized_offers_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES hotel_lists ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is receiving the recommendation */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel or resort list recommended */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was last updated */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., hotel, resort) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES hotel_lists ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_history" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel or resort list booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES hotel_lists ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., revenue, user engagement) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the metric (e.g., country, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel or resort list */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "photo_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_photos_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("list_id") REFERENCES hotel_lists ("list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)
